---
title: "Reagents and tools table"
author:
  - name: Christina Schmidt
    affiliation:
    - Heidelberg University
output:
  html_document:
    self_contained: true
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    toc_depth: 5
    code_folding: show
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Standard Metabolomics}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: console
---



# Session information

```{r session_info, echo=FALSE}
options(width = 120)
sessionInfo()
```

# Load and merge tables

```{r merge_tables}
library(dplyr)

# ── Load ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
biorxiv  <- read.csv("BioRxiv/renv_resource_table.csv",  check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)
revision <- read.csv("Revision/renv_resource_table.csv", check.names = FALSE, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

names(biorxiv)[1]  <- "Package"
names(revision)[1] <- "Package"

# ── Merge ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
merged <- full_join(biorxiv, revision, by = "Package", suffix = c("_BioRxiv", "_Revision"))
merged <- merged %>% select(Package, everything())

# ── Resolve: Reference or Source ─────────────────────────────────────────────
# Helper: extract version number from an Identifier string like "CRAN; dplyr 1.1.4"
extract_version <- function(x) {
  vapply(x, function(xi) {
    m <- regmatches(xi, regexpr("[0-9]+(?:\\.[0-9]+)+(?:-[0-9]+)?", xi, perl = TRUE))
    if (length(m) == 0 || is.na(m)) NA_character_ else m
  }, character(1))
}

merged <- merged %>%
  mutate(
    ref_b = `Reference or Source_BioRxiv`,
    ref_r = `Reference or Source_Revision`,
    `Reference_or_Source_same` = case_when(
      is.na(ref_b) | is.na(ref_r) ~ TRUE,
      ref_b == ref_r               ~ TRUE,
      TRUE                         ~ FALSE
    ),
    `Reference or Source` = mapply(function(rb, rr, ib, ir) {
      if (is.na(rb) && is.na(rr)) return(NA_character_)
      if (is.na(rb)) return(rr)
      if (is.na(rr)) return(rb)
      if (rb == rr)  return(rb)
      vb <- extract_version(ib); vr <- extract_version(ir)
      tryCatch(
        if (!is.na(vr) && !is.na(vb) && package_version(vr) >= package_version(vb)) rr else rb,
        error = function(e) rb
      )
    }, ref_b, ref_r,
       `Identifier or Catalog Number_BioRxiv`,
       `Identifier or Catalog Number_Revision`,
       USE.NAMES = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  select(-ref_b, -ref_r) %>%
  mutate(
    id_b = `Identifier or Catalog Number_BioRxiv`,
    id_r = `Identifier or Catalog Number_Revision`,
    `Identifier_or_Catalog_Number_same` = case_when(
      is.na(id_b) | is.na(id_r) ~ TRUE,
      id_b == id_r               ~ TRUE,
      TRUE                       ~ FALSE
    ),
    `Identifier or Catalog Number` = mapply(function(ib, ir) {
      if (is.na(ib) && is.na(ir)) return(NA_character_)
      if (is.na(ib)) return(ir)
      if (is.na(ir)) return(ib)
      if (ib == ir)  return(ib)
      vb <- extract_version(ib); vr <- extract_version(ir)
      tryCatch(
        if (!is.na(vr) && !is.na(vb) && package_version(vr) >= package_version(vb)) ir else ib,
        error = function(e) ib
      )
    }, id_b, id_r, USE.NAMES = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  select(-id_b, -id_r)%>%
  mutate(
    mpv_b = MetaProViz_Dependency_BioRxiv,
    mpv_r = MetaProViz_Dependency_Revision,
    `MetaProViz_Dependency_same` = case_when(
      is.na(mpv_b) | is.na(mpv_r) ~ TRUE,
      mpv_b == mpv_r              ~ TRUE,
      TRUE                        ~ FALSE
    ),
    `MetaProViz_Dependency` = mapply(function(mb, mr, ib, ir) {
      if (is.na(mb) && is.na(mr)) return(NA_character_)
      if (is.na(mb)) return(mr)
      if (is.na(mr)) return(mb)
      if (mb == mr)  return(mb)
      vb <- extract_version(ib); vr <- extract_version(ir)
      tryCatch(
        if (!is.na(vr) && !is.na(vb) && package_version(vr) >= package_version(vb)) mr else mb,
        error = function(e) mb
      )
    }, mpv_b, mpv_r,
       `Identifier or Catalog Number_BioRxiv`,
       `Identifier or Catalog Number_Revision`,
       USE.NAMES = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  select(-mpv_b, -mpv_r) %>%
  mutate(
    load_b = `LoadedBy_run_pipeline.sh_BioRxiv`,
    load_r = `LoadedBy_run_pipeline.sh_Revision`,
    `LoadedBy_run_pipeline.sh_same` = case_when(
      is.na(load_b) | is.na(load_r) ~ TRUE,
      load_b == load_r              ~ TRUE,
      TRUE                          ~ FALSE
    ),
    `LoadedBy_run_pipeline.sh` = mapply(function(lb, lr, ib, ir) {
      if (is.na(lb) && is.na(lr)) return(NA)
      if (is.na(lb)) return(lr)
      if (is.na(lr)) return(lb)
      if (lb == lr)  return(lb)
      vb <- extract_version(ib); vr <- extract_version(ir)
      tryCatch(
        if (!is.na(vr) && !is.na(vb) && package_version(vr) >= package_version(vb)) lr else lb,
        error = function(e) lb
      )
    }, load_b, load_r,
       `Identifier or Catalog Number_BioRxiv`,
       `Identifier or Catalog Number_Revision`,
       USE.NAMES = FALSE)
  ) %>%
  select(-load_b, -load_r)

# ── Select ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
merged_select <- merged %>%
  filter(MetaProViz_Dependency == TRUE | LoadedBy_run_pipeline.sh == TRUE)%>%
  select(Package, `Reference or Source`, `Identifier or Catalog Number`, MetaProViz_Dependency, LoadedBy_run_pipeline.sh)


# ── Export ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
write.csv(merged, "renv_resource_table_merged_full.csv", row.names = FALSE)
write.csv(merged_select, "renv_resource_table_merged_select.csv", row.names = FALSE)

```
